title: Show HN: Needle: We Distilled Gemini Tool Calling into a 26M Model
summary: Needle is a 26M parameter open-source model for single-shot tool calling, distilled from Gemini. It uses a simple attention-only architecture (no FFN layers) to achieve fast inference on consumer devices. Trained on 200B tokens and fine-tuned on synthetic function-calling data, it outperforms larger models in its niche while being deployable on phones, watches, and glasses.
